description: Edit a traffic light phase duration in the Bologna Acosta network (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_buslanes.net.xml) using netedit. This is a real-world road network from the Acosta area in Bologna, Italy. Change the duration of the first phase (row 0) of a traffic-light-controlled junction to 45 seconds. Save the modified traffic light program to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/modified_tls.xml.
